creator: jwb@freebsd.org
text:
FYI, there's a new release candidate available, but the notes are not too encouraging.

https://github.com/GoldenCheetah/GoldenCheetah/releases/tag/v3.6-RC3

It bundles Python 3.7.9 (FreeBSD default is 3.9 now) and states compatibility with R 3.4 to 4.0 (FreeBSD is on 4.2).

Does anyone want to try make this work within the ports system, or should we just close this PR?
